metadata.source_title: Growth in supermarket deliveries is declining

text: Fatima El Kharraz. [Henk Hofstede](https://www.abnamro.nl/nl/zakelijk/insights/authors/henk-hofstede/index.html). Show all authors. After years of strong growth in grocery deliveries by supermarkets, this now appears to be leveling off. ABN AMRO's aggregated and anonymized transaction data shows that the number of deliveries has increased by 'only' 11 percent in the past twelve months. In 2023 and for the whole of 2024, the average monthly growth was 69 and 21 percent respectively.

metadata.source_title: Growth in supermarket deliveries is declining

text: Show all authors. After years of strong growth in grocery deliveries by supermarkets, this now appears to be leveling off. ABN AMRO's aggregated and anonymized transaction data shows that the number of deliveries has increased by 'only' 11 percent in the past twelve months. In 2023 and for the whole of 2024, the average monthly growth was 69 and 21 percent respectively. Download the complete report.

metadata.source_title: Growth in supermarket deliveries is declining

text:
After years of strong growth in grocery deliveries by supermarkets, this now appears to be leveling off. ABN AMRO's aggregated and anonymized transaction data shows that the number of deliveries has increased by 'only' 11 percent in the past twelve months. In 2023 and for the whole of 2024, the average monthly growth was 69 and 21 percent respectively. Download the complete report. Read more about economic developments in the retail sector in the report 'Growth in supermarket delivery is declining'.

metadata.source_title: Growth in supermarket deliveries is declining

text: Albert Heijn started delivering online orders in 2001. However, grocery delivery did not really get off the ground for a long time. The founding of Picnic in 2015, which only handles online orders and has no stores, accelerated the grocery delivery market. The corona pandemic further increased its popularity and caused a real growth explosion. Delivery growth has become less strong since the summer of 2023 and has declined slightly in recent months.

metadata.source_title: Growth in supermarket deliveries is declining

text: However, grocery delivery did not really get off the ground for a long time. The founding of Picnic in 2015, which only handles online orders and has no stores, accelerated the grocery delivery market. The corona pandemic further increased its popularity and caused a real growth explosion. Delivery growth has become less strong since the summer of 2023 and has declined slightly in recent months. According to research agency Circana, the online turnover share was [7.3 percent in 2024] (https://www.levenmiddelskrant.nl/circana--ah--picnic-en-dirk-winnen-meeste-marktaandeel) and 6.6 percent in 2023.

metadata.source_title: Growth in supermarket deliveries is declining

text: The founding of Picnic in 2015, which only handles online orders and has no stores, accelerated the grocery delivery market. The corona pandemic further increased its popularity and caused a real growth explosion. Delivery growth has become less strong since the summer of 2023 and has declined slightly in recent months. According to research agency Circana, the online turnover share was [7.3 percent in 2024] (https://www.levenmiddelskrant.nl/circana--ah--picnic-en-dirk-winnen-meeste-marktaandeel) and 6.6 percent in 2023. Despite the slowdown that followed the pandemic, growth in supermarket deliveries continues.

metadata.source_title: Growth in supermarket deliveries is declining

text: The corona pandemic further increased its popularity and caused a real growth explosion. Delivery growth has become less strong since the summer of 2023 and has declined slightly in recent months. According to research agency Circana, the online turnover share was [7.3 percent in 2024] (https://www.levenmiddelskrant.nl/circana--ah--picnic-en-dirk-winnen-meeste-marktaandeel) and 6.6 percent in 2023. Despite the slowdown that followed the pandemic, growth in supermarket deliveries continues. In the past twelve months, the average monthly growth was 11 percent compared to the same period a year earlier.

metadata.source_title: Growth in supermarket deliveries is declining

text: Delivery growth has become less strong since the summer of 2023 and has declined slightly in recent months. According to research agency Circana, the online turnover share was [7.3 percent in 2024] (https://www.levenmiddelskrant.nl/circana--ah--picnic-en-dirk-winnen-meeste-marktaandeel) and 6.6 percent in 2023. Despite the slowdown that followed the pandemic, growth in supermarket deliveries continues. In the past twelve months, the average monthly growth was 11 percent compared to the same period a year earlier. For the whole of 2024, the average growth was 21 percent.

metadata.source_title: Growth in supermarket deliveries is declining

text: According to research agency Circana, the online turnover share was [7.3 percent in 2024] (https://www.levenmiddelskrant.nl/circana--ah--picnic-en-dirk-winnen-meeste-marktaandeel) and 6.6 percent in 2023. Despite the slowdown that followed the pandemic, growth in supermarket deliveries continues. In the past twelve months, the average monthly growth was 11 percent compared to the same period a year earlier. For the whole of 2024, the average growth was 21 percent. The number of online orders in April this year was more than three times as high as in 2019, while the number of transactions in the physical supermarket only increased by 21 percent. ##Dates and disclaimer.

metadata.source_title: Growth in supermarket deliveries is declining

text: Despite the slowdown that followed the pandemic, growth in supermarket deliveries continues. In the past twelve months, the average monthly growth was 11 percent compared to the same period a year earlier. For the whole of 2024, the average growth was 21 percent. The number of online orders in April this year was more than three times as high as in 2019, while the number of transactions in the physical supermarket only increased by 21 percent. ##Dates and disclaimer. ABN AMRO's transaction data is aggregated based on private accounts and completely anonymized.

The leveling off of growth in grocery delivery is caused by several factors. The high inflation in recent years makes prices feel high. metadata.source_title: Growth in supermarket deliveries is declining

text: Competition between online and physical. The leveling off of growth in grocery delivery is caused by several factors. The high inflation in recent years makes prices feel high. As a result, consumers have started shopping more consciously and are paying more attention to price and additional delivery costs. In addition, geopolitical tensions, such as wars and trade wars, keep consumer confidence low, making consumers more cautious with their spending.

metadata.source_title: Growth in supermarket deliveries is declining

text: The leveling off of growth in grocery delivery is caused by several factors. The high inflation in recent years makes prices feel high. As a result, consumers have started shopping more consciously and are paying more attention to price and additional delivery costs. In addition, geopolitical tensions, such as wars and trade wars, keep consumer confidence low, making consumers more cautious with their spending. These problems also affect physical stores, which performed poorly last year.

metadata.source_title: Growth in supermarket deliveries is declining

text: The high inflation in recent years makes prices feel high. As a result, consumers have started shopping more consciously and are paying more attention to price and additional delivery costs. In addition, geopolitical tensions, such as wars and trade wars, keep consumer confidence low, making consumers more cautious with their spending. These problems also affect physical stores, which performed poorly last year. According to Statistics Netherlands (CBS), volumes fell by 3.9 percent and turnover by 1 percent at supermarkets.

metadata.source_title: Growth in supermarket deliveries is declining

text: As a result, consumers have started shopping more consciously and are paying more attention to price and additional delivery costs. In addition, geopolitical tensions, such as wars and trade wars, keep consumer confidence low, making consumers more cautious with their spending. These problems also affect physical stores, which performed poorly last year. According to Statistics Netherlands (CBS), volumes fell by 3.9 percent and turnover by 1 percent at supermarkets. Given the continued growth of online orders, the decline can be entirely attributed to physical supermarkets.

text: In addition, geopolitical tensions, such as wars and trade wars, keep consumer confidence low, making consumers more cautious with their spending. These problems also affect physical stores, which performed poorly last year. According to Statistics Netherlands (CBS), volumes fell by 3.9 percent and turnover by 1 percent at supermarkets. An important explanation for this, as mentioned earlier, is that consumers pay more attention to prices.

text: An important explanation for this, as mentioned earlier, is that consumers pay more attention to prices. metadata.source_title: Growth in supermarket deliveries is declining

text: The difficult year for physical supermarkets is only to a limited extent due to the rise of delivery. As indicated, competition for shopping in stores through grocery delivery has grown significantly less rapidly than in previous years. The home delivery market appears to be slowly saturating and will become increasingly dependent on population growth and changes in consumer behavior. For example, the growing group of young people with little time, who use delivery services more often. However, all major supermarket chains in the Netherlands now offer delivery and they can deliver almost anywhere in the Netherlands.

metadata.source_title: Growth in supermarket deliveries is declining

text: As indicated, competition for shopping in stores through grocery delivery has grown significantly less rapidly than in previous years. The home delivery market appears to be slowly saturating and will become increasingly dependent on population growth and changes in consumer behavior. For example, the growing group of young people with little time, who use delivery services more often. However, all major supermarket chains in the Netherlands now offer delivery and they can deliver almost anywhere in the Netherlands. In addition, Crisp, for example, which also has no physical stores, chooses to focus on fresh food products, meal boxes and ready-made meals in order to distinguish itself from other online supermarkets.

metadata.source_title: Growth in supermarket deliveries is declining

text: The home delivery market appears to be slowly saturating and will become increasingly dependent on population growth and changes in consumer behavior. For example, the growing group of young people with little time, who use delivery services more often. However, all major supermarket chains in the Netherlands now offer delivery and they can deliver almost anywhere in the Netherlands. In addition, Crisp, for example, which also has no physical stores, chooses to focus on fresh food products, meal boxes and ready-made meals in order to distinguish itself from other online supermarkets. The growth in the number of orders for the online supermarket will continue for a while, but it is expected that this will gradually become less strong.

metadata.source_title: Growth in supermarket deliveries is declining

text: For example, the growing group of young people with little time, who use delivery services more often. However, all major supermarket chains in the Netherlands now offer delivery and they can deliver almost anywhere in the Netherlands. In addition, Crisp, for example, which also has no physical stores, chooses to focus on fresh food products, meal boxes and ready-made meals in order to distinguish itself from other online supermarkets. The growth in the number of orders for the online supermarket will continue for a while, but it is expected that this will gradually become less strong. Supermarkets would do well to look at how they can further expand the market for online groceries and how they can further optimize their deliveries.
